name: Sound Bath Meditation
description: An hour of sonic meditation with Nicholas Ray Bradford, gongs, Tibetan bowls, crystal harp, chimes, and more, with a tea ceremony to follow. Donation-based, give what you can. Sunday mornings rarely sound this good.
source_note: Submitted by Nicholas Bradford directly. Added 2026-05-13 via PR #2, re-added 2026-05-15 after W20 regeneration wiped it.

name: The Tempest by Tulsa Shakespeare Company
venue: Lynn Riggs Theatre at the Dennis R. Neill Equality Center
description: Tulsa Shakespeare Company presents The Tempest at the Equality Center, with a unique blend of traditional theatre and drag and an entirely LGBTQ+ cast, crew, and creative team. Six-night run May 14-16 and May 21-23, all shows at 8pm. Tickets at tulsashakespeare.com.
source_note: Direct outreach from Ibrahim, board president of Tulsa Shakespeare Company (Slack message 2026-04-30 5:33pm)
